plan.statewide_assessment: Research started from approved audit; enabling statutes confirmed (Title 50 Ch. 26 BIDs; narrow §50-1703A). No statewide registry located. Systematically verifying each candidate district for current activity via official city/district pages/ordinances and searching municipal GIS/ArcGIS/Open Data portals plus broader web for boundaries and any omitted active BIDs (e.g., Twin Falls, Moscow, Meridian, others). Boundaries preferentially validated as current polygon FeatureServer/MapServer or GeoJSON; PDFs/images/parcel lists flagged manual_review. Draft only; all items remain review_required.
